creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey!

I updated without issue my infra with Puppet and PuppetDB (some issues with Bolt but it is another story). So let's start with the low hanging fruits:

1. After upgrading, have you restarted PuppetServer / PuppetDB / Puppet?

2. If you have customization in config files, you may need to sync it with updated samples (e.g. my PuppetServer config has some TLS tuning, so I had to adjust the puppetserver configuration and change some "3.0" to "3.1" in path)?

3. Some gems will prevent puppetserver from starting when they are missing, for example I had to reinstall hiera-eyaml-rsa in the context of the puppetserver before it would start, so in my case:

# puppetserver gem install ...

4. Regarding:
> Unable to find archive module in modulepath /usr/local/etc/puppet/modules:/usr/local/etc/puppet/modules
This seems odd, unless you are not using a control-repo maybe?

5. If the above did not help, let's try to gather some info:

# cat /usr/local/etc/puppet/puppet.conf
[main]
server = REDACTED
splay = true
[master]
storeconfigs = true
storeconfigs_backend = puppetdb
reports = puppetdb
dns_alt_names = puppet.blogreen.org
[agent]
usecacheonfailure = false

# puppet config print codedir     
/usr/local/etc/puppet

# cat /usr/local/etc/puppet/code/environments/production/environment.conf 
modulepath = modules:site-modules

# puppet config print modulepath
/usr/local/etc/puppet/environments/production/modules:/usr/local/etc/puppet/environments/production/site-modules
